channel.title: Tonderai Lucian Davies
channel.description: Recent content on Tonderai Lucian Davies

item.title: Genesis block
item.description: I have been attempting to write for over a year. Lets see if it sticks The website has a simple stack underneath powered by hugo base with a template called minimal. Didn’t want to fiddle to much otherwise you wouldn’t be reading this. It is hosted on github as a simple static website. I might consider adding a domain but only when I have reached 5 posts. Another thing I might add is a newsletter subscribe option but again I don’t need the pressure yet.

item.title: About me
item.description: Super villain seeking minions to help steal world peace. Wingman to my better half. debugger of code
